creator: rodrigo@bebik.net
text:
On 02/03/11 13:24, arved@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [NEW PORT] devel/smartCVS, a powerful graphical CVS client written in Java
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: arved
> State-Changed-When: Thu Feb 3 12:23:51 UTC 2011
> State-Changed-Why:
> I am sorry no developer was interested in committing your port.
>
> If you are still interested in getting this into FreeBSD, submit an update
> to the latest version. Thanks.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=149947
>
>
Hi,

Here comes an update for the smartCVS pointing to the latest version.
I also include version information based on the wiki page and some examples.
I'm not really sure if I did it right, so let me know if there is things 
to fix.

Regards
Rodrigo
